mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO radiation_log ( plant_id, base_time, day_offset, gti, gti_instant, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.plantId}, #{item.baseTime}, #{item.dayOffset}, #{item.gti}, #{item.gtiInstant}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE gti = COALESCE(VALUES(gti), gti), gti_instant = COALESCE(VALUES(gti_instant), gti_instant), updated_at = COALESCE(VALUES(updated_at), updated_at)
